ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "x_coordinate" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the location */,
  "y_coordinate" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the location */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the location is situated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "slope" REAL /* Slope of the location in degrees */,
  "aspect" REAL /* Aspect of the location in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_danger_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index (e.g., FFMC, DMC, DC, ISI) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meteorological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meteorological data entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire incident the data belongs to */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "rh" INTEGER /* Relative humidity (RH) in percentage */,
  "wind" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "rain" REAL /* Rainfall in millimeters */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation in watts per square meter */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture in percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_risk_levels" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk level */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Name of the risk level (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk level */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for the risk level (e.g., green, yellow, red) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the fire incident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the fire incident was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the fire incident was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fire risk assessment */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being assessed */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year (e.g., mar, oct) */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., fri, tue) */,
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk level */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was made */,
  "assessment_time" TEXT /* Time when the assessment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_risk_assessments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_risk_assessments_risk_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_id") REFERENCES fire_risk_levels ("risk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_fires" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical fire record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire incident */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the fire incident occurred */,
  "burned_area" REAL /* Total area burned in hectares */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Cause of the fire (e.g., lightning, human activity) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  "fire_size" REAL /* Size of the fire in hectares */,
  "fire_type" TEXT /* Type of fire (e.g., wildfire, prescribed burn) */,
  "fire_behavior" TEXT /* Behavior of the fire (e.g., slow spread, rapid spread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire incident */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "version_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was updated */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Lead researcher of the team */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* List of team members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_team_incidents" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire incident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the fire incident was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the fire incident was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "incident_id")
)
